description:
Implement `hx-rating` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Star rating input for user feedback and display.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-rating/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-rating.ts`, `hx-rating.styles.ts`, `hx-rating.stories.ts`, `hx-rating.test.ts`

**Props:** `value` (number, 0 to max), `max` (number, default 5), `precision` (0.5|1, default 1 — allow half-star ratings), `readonly` (boolean), `disabled` (boolean), `name` (string — form field), `label` (string — accessible)

**Slots:** `icon` (custom rating icon, default is star)

**Events:** `hx-change` (`{ value }`), `hx-hover` (`{ value }` — while hovering for preview)

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `symbol` (each star/icon)

**ARIA:** `role="radiogroup"` with `aria-label`. Each star is `role="radio"` with `aria-label="N star"` and `aria-checked`. Keyboard: Arrow Left/Right change value, Home sets to 0, End sets to max. When readonly: `role="img"` with `aria-label="Rating: N out of max"`.

**ElementInternals:** Form participant. `setFormValue(String(value))`.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (click to rate, keyboard, hover preview, half-star, readonly, form submission), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all modes, bundle < 3KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-rating — T3 Star Rating Input
